overall.description: A cinematic nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street with neon lighting and light rain. The game engine footage shows the camera moving through a covered commercial walkway with reflective wet surfaces, holographic advertisements, and modern glass architecture, following NPCs through the environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a modern building entrance featuring a vertical garden wall with lush greenery. Two NPCs stand conversing near a potted tree while the camera observes from a short distance before beginning to walk forward past them toward elevator doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway beneath glowing neon strips

overhanging roof structure providing shelter from rain

large glowing advertisement display on distant building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered commercial walkway lined with cyan neon light strips and storefront displays. The wet pavement reflects the neon glow as the camera passes palm trees and approaches distant holographic billboards visible through the open side of the arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area with holographic table display

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an outdoor seating area featuring tables with holographic displays and glowing lounge chairs. Two NPCs sit at a table conversing over the holographic projection before the person in the bright pink jacket stands up and departs, while the camera circles the scene observing the futuristic furniture and passing traffic visible on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to busy street with traffic barriers

events.description: camera begins following the pedestrian in the pink jacket who just left the table

agents.ego_description: following the pedestrian in the pink jacket along the sidewalk next to the street

entered.detail: black and yellow bollards separating sidewalk from street

illuminated traffic signal showing red light
illuminated sign with 'JINGUI' text on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the pedestrian in the pink jacket along a wet sidewalk bordered by traffic barriers. The scene features neon-lit storefronts including a prominent 'JINGUI' sign, palm trees, and a crosswalk ahead. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction as light traffic moves along the adjacent street reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a lush, interior building entrance into a rain-slicked, neon-drenched cyberpunk street. It begins by passing a vertical garden wall and conversing NPCs before moving forward through a covered commercial walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up toward an outdoor seating area where holographic displays glow on tables and lounge chairs, with the camera circling the scene as a pedestrian in a pink jacket stands to depart. The movement then shifts to follow this individual along a wet sidewalk, passing under a prominent JINGUI sign and palm trees. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a bustling city crosswalk where light traffic and other pedestrians move across pavement reflecting the vibrant city lights.
